mapper.sql: c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.parent_comment_id, c.user_id, c.language_code, c.content, c.status, c.floor_no, c.like_count, c.created_time, c.updated_time, author.username AS author_username, COALESCE(NULLIF(author.display_name, ''), author.username) AS author_name, author.avatar_url AS author_avatar_url, parent.user_id AS parent_user_id, parent_author.username AS parent_author_username, COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_author.display_name, ''), parent_author.username) AS parent_author_name, CASE WHEN #{viewerId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM comment_likes liked WHERE liked.comment_id = c.comment_id AND liked.user_id = #{viewerId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked_by_viewer
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id, post_id, parent_comment_id, user_id, language_code, content, status, floor_no, like_count, created_time, updated_time FROM comments WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}

SELECT
FROM comments c JOIN users author ON author.user_id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN comments parent ON parent.comment_id = c.parent_comment_id LEFT JOIN users parent_author ON parent_author.user_id = parent.user_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId}

SELECT
FROM comments c JOIN users author ON author.user_id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN comments parent ON parent.comment_id = c.parent_comment_id LEFT JOIN users parent_author ON parent_author.user_id = parent.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.status IN ('VISIBLE', 'DELETED') ORDER BY c.floor_no ASC, c.created_time ASC, c.comment_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments ( post_id, parent_comment_id, user_id, language_code, content, status, floor_no, like_count ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{userId}, #{languageCode}, #{content}, #{status}, #{floorNo}, COALESCE(#{likeCount}, 0) )
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET status = 'DELETED' WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND status = 'VISIBLE'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO comment_likes (comment_id, user_id) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{userId})
